"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\app.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\Users\user\Main\Projects\C\rays_c_graphics_engine\bin\app.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libapp.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\app.dir\linkLibs.rsp
